subject: Re: Fwd: To Amy Dempsey
body:
john without you   why?


----- Original Message ----
From: Darren <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeffrey epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, May 7, 2008 6:45:03 AM
Subject: Fwd: To Amy Dempsey


FYI  

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:


From: "Amy Claire Dempsey" <bioimpact@islands.vi>
Date: May 7, 2008 6:24:52 AM GMT-04:00
To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Subject: RE: To Amy Dempsey


Darren,
 
I wish I had some time free.  I am in the BVI today, I am taking John over to LSJ at 930 to look at the ramp to make a determination if we have any wiggle room on the Water/Land issue.
 
Amy
 
From:DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, May 06, 2008 3:47 PM
To: bioimpact@islands.vi
Subject: To Amy Dempsey
 
Hey!  I am in St. Thomas until tomorrow afternoon.  Would love to catch up for a half hour to go over stuff.  Am staying at Ritz Carlton Club and working out of FTC's office.  Call me at 862-485-6315.  Thanks.
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone: 212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

 
------------------------------

Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's particular circumstances from an independent tax advisor.

Except for personal use by the intended recipient, or as expressly authorized by the sender, any person who receives this information is prohibited from disclosing, copying, distributing, and/or using it.
